programs.description: Multi-centre cohort study of cardiovascular risk factors across EHDS member states. Aims to improve 10-year event prediction models.
programs.dataNeeded: FHIR Conditions, Observations (blood pressure, cholesterol), Medications

programs.description: Identifying biomarker patterns predicting Type 2 Diabetes complication onset using longitudinal EHR data.
programs.dataNeeded: OMOP Drug Exposures, Condition Occurrences, Measurements (HbA1c, eGFR)

programs.description: Cross-border respiratory disease surveillance leveraging EHDS priority datasets (COPD, asthma).
programs.dataNeeded: FHIR Conditions (asthma, COPD), Observation spirometry values

ehdsArticle: EHDS Art. 10 — Secondary use opt-in consent
gdprBasis: GDPR Art. 9(2)(j) — scientific research with appropriate safeguards
